message:
perf(storage): apply same null/msgpack-only insert pattern to conversation metadata

Extends 617da521's three-way payload pattern from messages.extra_json
to conversations.metadata_json. The two columns share the same dual
storage shape (one TEXT JSON column + one BLOB msgpack column) but
the conversation insert was still doing the original always-write-
both-columns path.

franken_metadata_insert_payload(value: &serde_json::Value) returns
(Option<Cow<'_, str>>, Option<Vec<u8>>) with four-way semantics:

- historical raw JSON → (Some(Cow::Borrowed(raw)), None) so the
  original byte sequence (formatting, key order) is preserved in
  metadata_json verbatim.
- value is JSON null → (Some(Cow::Borrowed("null")), None). Note
  this is *deliberately different* from the message-extra path:
  conversations.metadata_json is required-NOT-NULL by the schema
  in the worker side, so we keep the literal string "null" there
  and metadata_bin as SQL NULL. The franken_read_metadata_compat
  reader resolves both shapes to JSON null on the way back out, so
  round-trip equality is preserved.
- value is an empty JSON object {} → (None, None). The schema
  permits this column to be SQL NULL and the reader returns an
  empty object, so storing two NULLs avoids writing "{}" + 6-byte
  msgpack everywhere just to mean "no metadata."
- non-empty value with successful msgpack encoding → (None,
  Some(bytes)) — same as the message path; drop the redundant JSON
  encoding.
- non-empty value where msgpack fails → (Some(Cow::Owned(json_text)),
  None) as the JSON-only fallback.

The franken_insert_conversation() call site loses the explicit
serialize_json_to_msgpack(...) + serde_json::to_string(...) lines
(both of which always ran on every insert) and threads the helper's
output into the parameterized INSERT.

Two new tests:
- conversation_insert_preserves_null_metadata_json_as_json_null:
  inserts a conversation with metadata_json = JSON null, asserts
  metadata_json column is exactly the string "null", metadata_bin
  is SQL NULL, and list_conversations()[0].metadata_json is JSON
  null after round-trip.
- conversation_insert_stores_nonempty_metadata_as_msgpack_only:
  inserts an object payload, asserts metadata_json column is SQL
  NULL while metadata_bin holds the msgpack encoding, and the
  reader returns the original JSON via the compat path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
